evals.prompt: scrape instagram leads for SaaS founders and agency owners, limit to 20
evals.expected_output: Claude runs scrape_leads.py with --hashtags and --limit args, shows the command, explains what it does and what to do next

evals.prompt: generate DM messages for my instagram leads using ChatGPT
evals.expected_output: Claude runs generate_messages.py, recommends --dry-run first, shows the command, explains that messages are saved to Google Sheets and sent manually

evals.prompt: run the full instagram pipeline — find 30 agency owners and write personalized DMs
evals.expected_output: Claude runs scrape_leads.py then generate_messages.py in sequence, uses correct args, shows both commands clearly

evals.prompt: show me my instagram outreach status — how many leads do I have?
evals.expected_output: Claude reads the Google Sheet, shows total leads, status breakdown, and the sheet link
